resources.string: Brass teeth grind, oiled by the red tithe.

Peace is but the putrid gasp between hammer blows. Upon the ashen crust, brass hunger churns a river of gore. Legions of iron march the world flat. Great engines graft steel into marrow and flesh into metal. Pillars of soot rise until the crimson vault forgets the stars. No throne is high enough to command it. No soul is small enough to be spared. The war engine reaps them both.
